description: This file defines a Cloud Development Kit (CDK) stack for deploying tenant-specific resources in AWS, including API Gateway, Lambda layers, DynamoDB tables, and custom resources for tenant mapping. It sets up infrastructure components and outputs relevant resource identifiers.

classes.name: TenantTemplateStack
classes.description: A CDK stack class that provisions AWS resources for a tenant, including API Gateway, Lambda layers, DynamoDB mappings, and outputs resource identifiers.

methods.name: ssmLookup
methods.description: Helper method to retrieve a parameter value from AWS SSM Parameter Store.
